content.text:
Looking at the image, the track runs straight ahead with the car positioned on the left gravel/grass area near the white edge line, needing to move right onto the dark asphalt.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 116, target = (116 + 5) % 121 = 0
- Target WP0: x=3.0597, y=0.6827
- Car: x=2.7037, y=0.9936, heading=12.972°
- dy = 0.6827 - 0.9936 = -0.3109
- dx = 3.0597 - 2.7037 = 0.3560
- bearing = atan2(-0.3109, 0.3560) = -41.15°
- delta = -41.15° - 12.972° = -54.12°
- Normalize: -54.12° → waypoint is to the RIGHT → use negative steering

Delta = -54.12°, sharp right correction needed. Car is still far left (y=0.994 vs centerline y=0.683), distance_from_center=0.311m (nearly half track width of 0.381m).

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car is still far left of center (y=0.994 vs centerline y=0.683, dist=0.311m) on the gravel edge, with delta=-54° to target waypoint requiring maximum right correction to get back onto the asphalt.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn (CCW), negative = right turn (CW)",
    "Track centerline y~0.683 on this straight section; car y~0.994 means car is far left of center",
    "Car has been persistently left of center (y: 0.956→0.980→0.994) — correction not working fast enough",
    "When delta > 50°, use speed=0.75-1.0 and steering=-20 to -25",
    "Track runs nearly due east for next ~20 waypoints (y stays ~0.68)",
    "Once delta < 5°, switch to 0 steering to avoid oscillation",
    "Track width 0.76m — very narrow, precision required",
    "Progress 98% — nearly complete lap, stay on track at all costs",
    "Car is on gravel/grass edge — need maximum right correction now",
    "Delta -54° → use steering=-25 at speed=0.75 for maximum correction"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.525, 2.605, 2.704],
    "y": [0.956, 0.980, 0.994],
    "yaw": [14.06, 14.78, 12.97]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP0 at (3.060, 0.683): dy=-0.311, dx=0.356, bearing=-41.15°, delta=-54.12° → sharp right correction needed",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": -25.0
}
```
